title: Workflow Policy Layer implementation
description:
Implement the approved Workflow Policy Layer for opencode-bridge so callback-driven isolated continuations can advance multi-step workflows automatically across multiple OpenCode lanes.

Source-of-truth artifacts:
- docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-09-opencode-workflow-policy-layer-design.md
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-09-opencode-workflow-policy-layer-implementation-plan.md
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-09-opencode-workflow-policy-layer-tasks.md
- docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-09-opencode-workflow-policy-layer-implement.md

Execution shape: multi-lane coding

Objective:
- minimal workflow state + step intent model
- intent-to-lane resolution
- callback-driven isolated continuation transitions
- observability/status additions
- tests

Constraints:
- keep first pass minimal/additive
- preserve existing callback authority model
- fail-fast on unresolved lane or invalid transition
- avoid duplicate callback double-launch
- do not build a heavyweight workflow DSL in this pass
